plugins.name: hello-world
plugins.description: A hello world reference plugin for Claude Code agent tools.

plugins.name: docs-tools
plugins.description: Documentation review, writing, and workflow tools for Red Hat AsciiDoc and Markdown documentation.

plugins.name: vale-tools
plugins.description: Vale linting tools for validating documentation using Vale CLI.

plugins.name: dita-tools
plugins.description: AsciiDoc cleanup, validation, and rewriting tools for DITA conversion preparation.

plugins.name: jtbd-tools
plugins.description: Jobs-To-Be-Done analysis toolkit for documentation restructuring. Extract JTBD records from Markdown, AsciiDoc, and topic map repos. Generate goal-oriented TOCs, compare structures, and produce consolidation reports.
